node.title: Uber LLD Process for L5 Sr Software Engineer| India

article.title: Uber LLD Process for L5 Sr Software Engineer| India
article.content:
**Software Engineering - Depth in Specialization (Coding 2) (60 min)
**
What kind of LLD questions will ask, specific to Uber?
Do we need to use any IDE or any platform they provide to run/Execute or simple coding with no execution?

post.content: they ask to run the code. the code should give correct output, and this has the most weight.\nyes they provide ide, mostly code signal.\nalso for me, they asked something like on call rotation system if employee is not bale to resolve issue, that is escalated to manager. and if manager is not able to resolve it, gets escalated to director.
Hey, did your LLD happen? What was asked
